title: YTP Tennis: Danny Noriega Isn't Lichen it
description:
Round 1 of YTP Tennis vs. GreatBritishTurd.

This is my first opponent of a Youtube Poop Tennis Cup that is going on at YouChewPoop.  Whether or not I advance to the next bracket depends on how everyone there thinks I do against this guy.  Cross your fingers and hope they approve.  Enjoy! :)
